name: pdesk-startup-content
description: Startup-content parity (platform-foundation P0 fix, verified per-run): the packaged exe boots the dist-shipped sample workspace (63-node atlas, scope ctx-atlas) — not the 12-node inline toy graph it silently booted before P0. Read-only; runs before any test that loads a different graph.

commands: (() => { const f = window.__canaryGetFullSnapshot(); if (!f || f.ok !== true) throw new Error('full snapshot unavailable: ' + JSON.stringify(f)); const nodes = f.value.nodes && f.value.nodes.count; const scope = f.value.scope && f.value.scope.activeContextId; const problems = []; if (nodes !== 63) problems.push('node count ' + nodes + ' !== 63 (inline toy = 12; wrong/missing dist sample otherwise)'); if (scope !== 'ctx-atlas') problems.push('boot scope ' + scope + ' !== ctx-atlas'); if (problems.length) throw new Error('STARTUP CONTENT: ' + problems.join(' | ')); return 'pass: shipped 63-node sample booted (ctx-atlas)'; })()
